painting.title: The Virgin of the Rocks
painting.description: The Virgin, Infant Jesus, Infant John the Baptist and an angel, c.1491-1508.

painting.title: The Burlington House Cartoon
painting.description: The Virgin and Child with Saint Anne and the Infant Saint John, c.1499-1500.

painting.title: The Adoration of the Kings
painting.description: A crowded, chaotic nativity scene, 1564.

painting.title: The Virgin and Child
painting.description: One of the earliest works in the collection, c.1300.

painting.title: Saint Jerome in a Rocky Landscape
painting.description: A dramatic world landscape with the penitent saint, c.1515-1524.

painting.title: The Arnolfini Portrait
painting.description: A remarkably detailed double portrait, 1434.

painting.title: Scenes from a Passion of Christ
painting.description: A continuous narrative of the Passion of Christ, c.1470-1471.

painting.title: Venus and Mars
painting.description: An allegorical painting showing Venus watching over a sleeping Mars, c.1483.

painting.title: Portrait of a Young Man
painting.description: A penetrating portrait study in the Northern Renaissance tradition, 1521.

painting.title: The Baptism of Christ
painting.description: Christ stands in the River Jordan, c.1437-1445.

painting.title: The Agony in the Garden
painting.description: Christ prays in the Garden of Gethsemane, c.1458-1460.

painting.title: Portrait of a Young Man
painting.description: A thoughtful portrait from the Flemish master, c.1472-1475.

painting.title: An Allegory with Venus and Cupid
painting.description: A complex moral allegory presented as an erotic image, c.1545.

painting.title: The Entombment of Christ
painting.description: One of only three surviving panel paintings by Michelangelo, c.1500-1501.

painting.title: Pope Julius II
painting.description: A powerful portrait of the aging pope, 1511-1512.

painting.title: Portrait of a Man
painting.description: One of Titian's earliest portraits, c.1512.

painting.title: Bacchus and Ariadne
painting.description: The god of wine leaps from his chariot on seeing Ariadne, 1520-1523.

painting.title: The Ambassadors
painting.description: A double portrait packed with symbolic objects and an anamorphic skull, 1533.

painting.title: Self Portrait at the Age of 34
painting.description: One of dozens of self portraits by Rembrandt, 1640.

painting.title: A Young Woman standing at a Virginal
painting.description: An elegantly dressed woman plays the virginal, c.1670-1672.

painting.title: A Woman bathing in a Stream
painting.description: A tender study of a woman paddling in a stream, 1654.

painting.title: The Judgement of Paris
painting.description: Paris awards the golden apple to Venus, c.1632-1635.

painting.title: Samson and Delilah
painting.description: Delilah holds the shorn hair of the sleeping Samson, c.1609-1610.

painting.title: Equestrian Portrait of Charles I
painting.description: A monumental portrait of King Charles I on horseback, c.1637-1638.

painting.title: The Rokeby Venus
painting.description: Venus reclines on a bed, viewed from behind, c.1647-1651.

painting.title: Philip IV of Spain in Brown and Silver
painting.description: A commanding portrait of the Spanish king, c.1631-1632.

painting.title: The Supper at Emmaus
painting.description: Christ reveals himself to two disciples after his resurrection, 1601.

painting.title: Salome receives the Head of John the Baptist
painting.description: A dramatic scene rendered with characteristic use of shadow, c.1607-1610.

painting.title: The Adoration of the Golden Calf
painting.description: The Israelites worship the golden calf while Moses descends from Sinai, c.1633-1634.

painting.title: Seaport with the Embarkation of the Queen of Sheba
painting.description: The Queen of Sheba embarks on her journey to King Solomon, 1648.

painting.title: Landscape with the Marriage of Isaac and Rebecca
painting.description: Celebrating figures dance in an idyllic landscape, 1648.

painting.title: Belshazzar's Feast
painting.description: The moment of divine writing on the wall at the Babylonian king's feast, c.1636-1638.

painting.title: Portrait of Margaretha de Geer
painting.description: A late Rembrandt portrait of exceptional honesty and dignity, c.1661.

painting.title: A Lady seated at a Virginal
painting.description: A woman plays the virginal in a meticulously rendered Dutch interior, c.1670-1675.

room.n: Room 31 - Julia and Hans Rausing Room

painting.title: Mr and Mrs Andrews
painting.description: A newly married couple posed in their Suffolk estate, c.1750.

painting.title: The Fighting Temeraire
painting.description: A veteran warship towed to be broken up at sunset, 1839.

painting.title: Rain, Steam and Speed
painting.description: A locomotive charges across the Maidenhead Railway Bridge in a storm, 1844.

painting.title: The Hay Wain
painting.description: A farm cart crosses the River Stour at Flatford in Suffolk, 1821.

painting.title: Weymouth Bay
painting.description: A stormy sky over the Dorset coastline, c.1816.

painting.title: Dido building Carthage
painting.description: Turner's tribute to Claude, showing the legendary queen founding her city, 1815.

painting.title: The Duke of Wellington
painting.description: The first portrait of Wellington after his victory at Salamanca, 1812.

painting.title: Dona Isabel de Porcel
painting.description: A powerful portrait of an aristocratic Spanish woman, before 1805.

painting.title: Bathers at La Grenouillere
painting.description: One of Monet's earliest Impressionist paintings, 1869.

painting.title: Sunflowers
painting.description: A vase of sunflowers painted in Arles, 1888.

painting.title: Van Gogh's Chair
painting.description: A simple chair in Van Gogh's room in Arles, 1888.

painting.title: Bathers at Asnieres
painting.description: Working-class Parisians bathe in the Seine on a hot afternoon, 1884.

painting.title: Water-Lilies
painting.description: A vast, immersive view of Monet's lily pond at Giverny, c.1916-1926.

painting.title: Irises
painting.description: Irises surrounding the banks of the lily pond at Giverny, c.1914-1917.
